title: senecio doronicum subsp. corbariensis
intro: Senecio doronicum subsp. corbariensis, also known as Yellow Ragwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Yellow Ragwort include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to use it under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
